markdown.content:
## Agent Trace Explorer
Distributed trace spans from `System.Diagnostics.ActivitySource` instrumentation on flush, HTTP push, and sink operations.

kusto.query:
let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.traces
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize span_count = count() by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), operationName
| project timestamp, span_count, operationName
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Trace Spans by Operation", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

logship.agent.traces
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize count = count() by status
| project count, status
| order by count desc
| render piechart with (title = "Span Status Distribution", kind = "doughnut", legend = true)

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.traces
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where operationName == 'Flush'
| summarize avg_duration = avg(durationMs), p95_duration = percentile(durationMs, 95), max_duration = agg_max(durationMs) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| multi-project (timestamp:datetime, value:double, metric:string, machine:string) [
    timestamp, avg_duration, "avg_duration", machine,
    timestamp, p95_duration, "p95_duration", machine,
    timestamp, max_duration, "max_duration", machine
]
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Flush Span Duration", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, yUnit = "milliseconds", spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.traces
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where operationName == 'HttpPush'
| summarize avg_duration = avg(durationMs), p95_duration = percentile(durationMs, 95), max_duration = agg_max(durationMs) by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), machine
| multi-project (timestamp:datetime, value:double, metric:string, machine:string) [
    timestamp, avg_duration, "avg_duration", machine,
    timestamp, p95_duration, "p95_duration", machine,
    timestamp, max_duration, "max_duration", machine
]
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "HTTP Push Span Duration", fill = false, lineWidth = 2, legend = true, yUnit = "milliseconds", spanGaps = "auto")

let duration = $__endTime() - $__startTime();
let bucketSize = case(duration > 7d, 1d, duration > 1d, 1h, duration > 6h, 30m, duration > 1h, 5m, 1m);
logship.agent.traces
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| where status == 'Error'
| summarize error_count = count() by timestamp = bin(timestamp, bucketSize), operationName
| project timestamp, error_count, operationName
| order by timestamp asc
| render timechart with (title = "Error Spans by Operation", stacked = true, legend = true, spanGaps = "auto")

logship.agent.traces
| where timestamp > $__startTime() and timestamp <= $__endTime()
| summarize avg_duration = avg(durationMs), p50 = percentile(durationMs, 50), p95 = percentile(durationMs, 95), p99 = percentile(durationMs, 99), span_count = count() by operationName, source
| project operationName, source, span_count, avg_duration, p50, p95, p99
| order by span_count desc
| render table with (title = "Span Duration Summary")
